The '''Royal Icqui Aquaria''' was the most famous public aquarium on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was located in the [[Hirkenglade Prefecture]] and covered many square [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]], holding millions of creatures. Water was provided by the [[Deodurn polar pipeline]]. Many groups used the aquarium as neutral ground to meet on, since the recesses of the building were perfect for clandestine conversations and the number of visitors made attacks unlikely. Admission was 10 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="CatCW" />

After the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded Coruscant, survivors on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] used the aquarium as a food source.<ref name="CatCW" />

==Exhibits==
*[[Baraboo biomold]]<ref name="CatCW" />
*[[Riome]] [[Sea-snake|seasnakes]]<ref name="CatCW" />
*[[Firehead|Rhinnalian fireheads]]<ref name="CatCW" />
*[[Lurrian rimebat]]s<ref name="CatCW" />
*The Inner Orbit, a collection of species adapted to [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] conditions<ref name="CatCW" />
*An [[Opee sea killer/Legends|opee sea killer]]<ref name="CatCW" />
*A stuffed [[Whaladon/Legends|Whaladon]]<ref name="CatCW" />
*A [[Geonosian hydra]] skeleton<ref name="CatCW" />
*An alleged [[Sando aqua monster/Legends|sando aqua monster]] tooth<ref name="CatCW" />
